rulings.Case Title: IN RE: CR TITLE SERVICES INC. FKA FIVE STAR SRV CORP.
rulings.Calendar Matter: (Amended) Ntc Of Hearing Regarding Unresolved Claims And Deposit Of Undistributed Surplus Proceeds
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 3, 2013, line 1 - PETITIONER CR TITLE SERVICES INC's (Amended) Hearing Regarding Unresolved Claims And Deposit Of Undistributed Surplus Proceeds. Petitioner's hearing regarding unresolved claims and deposit of undistributed surplus proceeds is GRANTED. No opposition filed. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: DESIREE BARNES et al VS. TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 3, 2013, line 2 - Cross Complainant TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION's Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Cross Complaint. Cross Complainant Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation's Motion for Leave to File a First Amended Cross-Complaint is DENIED. Moving Party provides absolutely no evidence of recent discovery. The "Long Declaration" does not address any facts. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: DESIREE BARNES et al VS. TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 3, 2013, line 2 - Cross Complainant AMERICAN TECHNOLOGIES, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross Complaint. Cross Complainant American Technologies' Motion for Leave to File First Amended Cross-Complaint is DENIED. Moving party fails to explain 3 (January 10, 2013 (deposition) to April 10, 2013 (OST)) month delay in bringing this motion. =(EHG)

rulings.Case Title: DEBORA SILVERMAN VS. MURPHY SAN FRANCISCO LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: (Amended) Notice Of Moton And Motion For Protective Order Precluding Cumulative Deposition Testimony, Unwarranted Special Interrogatories And Inspection Demands
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 3, 2013, line 4 - DEFENDANT MURPHY SAN FRANCISCO LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, MURPHY INVESTMENTS, INC.,and BARTHOLOMEW MURPHY's (Amended)Motion For Protective Order Precluding Cumulative Deposition Testimony, Unwarranted Special Interrogatories And Inspection Demands. Defendant's Motion for Protective Order is continued to May 9, 2013 to be heard with other pending discovery motions. Parties to provide courtesy copies of moving papers, opposition and reply, if any, to Department 501 no later than May 3, 2013 4 p.m. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: ANNA TRUONG et al VS. RAMONA SCOTT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Production Of Records Under Possession, Custody And Control Of Deft To Allow Depositions Beyond Discovery Cut Off; Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 3, 2013, line 5 - PLAINTIFF ANNA TRUONG and TUYEN TRUONG's Motion For Production Of Records Under Possession, Custody And Control Of Deft To Allow Depositions Beyond Discovery Cut Off; Request For Monetary Sanctions. Plaintiff's Motion for Production of Records and to Allow Depositions beyond discovery cut off is GRANTED as to the e-mail at issue, if such e-mail has not been yet produced. Denied as to depositions and any additional production from third parities. Plaintiff knew about third parties' involvement in the subject matter of this case and apparently contemplated deposing them long before discovery cut-ff. See Feller Declaration paragraph 3. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 3, 2013, line 6 - PLAINTIFF MARITSA DI MEGLIO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is GRANTED, subject to opposition. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. KIMBERLY FULGHAM et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 3, 2013, line 7 - DEFENDANT KIMBERLY FULGHAM and MELISSA FULGHAM's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to reconcile allegations in complaint with attachments. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: 691 O'FARRELL STREET, LLC VS. KIM, LYNN, AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA NITE CAP BAR et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 3, 2013, line 8 - DEFENDANT KIM, LYNN, Ind. DBA NITE CAP BAR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges expiration of fixed term lease entered into by Defendant and Plaintiff's predecessor in interest. Lease and modifications are attached. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that notice was required. Moving party also fails to point to any facts in the complaint or in judicially noticeable documents showing written consent to create month-to-month tenancy at the expiration of fixed term. Complaint is not uncertain. Moving party is ordered to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C in future. Opposing party is ordered to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B in future. =(501/EHG)
